passages.excerpt:
1
Following "Mimic: insight

Q: (written + audio messages are created + sent, either scrambled set/ground or divided into [two] portions + requiring relinking the knowledge of which PTS to match being akin to the color coding of the 3-D a superimposed set/ground system unscrambling requiring the depth sense based on the color discrimination of the 3rd eye) although it is evident that the information emanates from Zebra (which is my nickname for the mimicking entity) for whom are they intended? other parts of Zebra? Is this how Zebra maintains itself as a concerted unitary entity? Like nerve impulses within a body - inner information, among the parts: Zebra is body or brain or both. This fit with my noetic impressions that we are within Zebra's body. In our own (micro)body Neural signals travel all over - sense impressions, orders to muscles pain, etc. our own bodies are alive with messages, so is Zebra. + there is coding (i.e. use of declaratory symbols + cypher)

It is interesting, how we inadvertently (unknowngly) carry Zebra's mesages for It., Piggyback on our own. it's as if Zebra says "as long as you're born, that direction take this along too" I suppose a phagocyte doesn't know anything about its [job?] either. In seeing these messages flying back & forth I may mave witnessed our primary function withinn Zebra. It certainly must be mine

Since I qua human for a [limited] time could discern Zebra's messages I think it possible that other humans can + do too + perhaps continually as PTS of Zebra.

Is this how Zebra maintains itself as a concerted unitary entity? Like nerve impulses within a body - inner information, among the parts: Zebra is body or brain or both. It is interesting, how we inadvertently (unknowngly) carry Zebra's mesages for It., Piggyback on our own. it's as if Zebra says "as long as you're born, that direction take this along too" I suppose a phagocyte doesn't know anything about its [job?] either. In seeing these messages flying back & forth I may mave witnessed our primary function withinn Zebra. It certainly must be mine

Since I qua human for a [limited] time could discern Zebra's messages I think it possible that other humans can + do too + perhaps continually as PTS of Zebra.

If PTS the Universe are not Zebra, then Zebra is not identical to the universe nor congruent with it as I saw it is fashioning itself out of the universe using it as raw material this is quite different from saying that The universe is alive" or "is God". It is as if the old universe is Zebra; antagonist (in the 2 player game).

In other words the flow of steganographic information is not a further mystery, but a heck of a big clue as to how human & human culture act vis-a-vis Zebra My big Q remains: how "faked" is our phenomenal world? At one end the A could be: it is partially [skewed?] reality; at the other end it is a total hypnotic delusion but the black iron prison - that is real, I used to be in that prison But just as Zebra's messages are small [threads?] embedded in large amounts of data. His causal chains are small [link] silent within a pointless or even evil larger aggregate. not directed by him in both cases I conceive of Zebra work within a large frame. Thus, not all events are caused by God, + not all messages are by/from him" it is a Golden thread [among] the [dross?] (by Zebra did not put Nixon in power, but he did remove him ) If I am correct about this, it is very important:

1) we are not talking about Brahman why is in all things (+ pantheism is not true) 2) God has an opposing subject which is either merely neutral or outright pitted against him 3) This explains how evil could exist though God is Good. 4) Yet this God certainly can be described as "He who causes to be," in that He enters the causal chains of ananke as [noös?], exactly as Plato saw in Timeus 5) Zebra is a creator God, but he is building a (new) earth out of or within the old, using it as source of parts that either the old is not his, or at the very least has become dissatisfied with it + is "cannibalizing" [& use] it

this piece has scriptural support ([Jerehamia?]) but basically it is a Greek idea; it here seems to describe Christ (Wisdom) than JHWH)

Although I understood the two systems of messages construction: 1) Subtraction of non-information e.a. I can't find animals to love which I could show you (2) Addition of two items, linking them by juxtaposition laughing last / there will be final justice

I did not fathom the inert-active duality of all things which I saw; viz: some objects inc. verbal ones, appeared in mode A which was: 1) At rest 2) inert or dead 3) not moving 4)intrinsic - not incorporated 5) Outside the growth a building process But: at any time an item, say a picture 1 Moves or was moved in some invisible way 2)Became animated + loving 3) entered a transformation or change flow 4)related to other objects meaningfully as a component 5)was incorporated at the right time in the proper place - which is to say, was placed by Zebra into the growing structure

What is odd is that although the object "moved visibly it certainly did not need to move in our space I must have been perceiving the [corpus?], which grows at a furious role as it incorporates more + more of the old Universe. This was the continual winning of the tricks. Between the 2 players that I saw

also maybe what happened to me internally o 3-74 was that I was "won" by Zebra + fitted into place, to function in his growing new structure. (world)

This growing, Corpus of Zebra is, like him, concealed by

what I am tempted to call the same mimicking mechanism process by which Zebra conceal himself from us: it is Mundo Absconditus, but in our midst. Surely this is the "Kingdom of his son" spoken of in Col. I. If indeed 3-74 was my passing over into the new world, I reason there must be other humane already there, already incorporated -surely they can read the messages (which are a lot like those from Runciter in Ubik).

6 so it is not only God that we can't perceive, but His will (as expression of His desiring object X to do Y + so be arranged as Z in regard to all else). The pressure of this arranging power is felt as will - His will. But we can't distinguish ananke (blind random events from the arranging activity - Zebra is camouflaged + Zebra arranging is + the arrangement itself is. All this was unscrambled for me in 3- 74. No wonder I all my actions vis-a-vis the Xerox letter (+ letters to Wiggins + the Wall St Journal) to be a higher will + mind displacing my own; I had been incorporated, + He was [desirous] that my response to the Xerox letter be what it was + in no way different -+ subjectively I felt an irresistible pressure - necessity that it be thus for whatever reason (arrangement) he desired. so he is not without force but - the universe has already been created; what remains now is the "Christification"" -ie omega of it. Upon the completion of this process, Crest will indeed be Lord of the Universe. Maybee the judgment is where you are going to get fitted in.

Once I said I wanted to see the world of unchange behind the change. The way it turned out. In that [Non-dokos?] [Dinge - an - sich?] world, there is furious rapid change- all in flux, as Heraclitus saod

11
it would not there cure evil, it would intervene in advance + direct the universe along a better causal path thus the enslaving plans by the creator simply would never materialize (i.e. be actualized); they would die out as mere intent + design - absolutely the opposite from the true God's plan which is never just intention but always absolutely actualized simultaneous with its concerting evil purposes but cannot over execute. The divine has always already executed (evil, like us, is stuck [first?] in forward moving linear time, so it can be said as Paul says in Col I, that God is rescuing us from the domain of darkness + transferring us to the kingdom of his dear Son: I can set that no matter what ill seems to happen (grow) we are on a continual path (dharma) the kingdom. Life can be regarded as a linear path of obstacles (trials, tests) which are surmounted in after invisible ways in that they are converted into stages of growth bringing the Universe itself -+ us - closer + Closer toward omega: the kingdom. What we see happening + what actually is happening are 2 different things, usually the "birthpains of growth, being so painful, obscure the growth itself. We confuse the two - identifying a reduction of pain with progress. (Due to the faulty dualism of the pleasure-pain principle.)

- these messages: I just suddenly realized (remembered) that they serve to program us, subliminally, usually this way: a written message one out if hundreds or even thousands which we see, is somehow caused to [link?] with an interval (in one of us, whom Zebra selects) system, as if the [system?] is engrammed by Zebra via the message very [deliberately?], with the person consciously none the wiser.
